That there is an occult power is to be admitted by everybody. Cosmic
power is such a power which tan be inherited by the human beings.
The word cosmic is derived from the L~tin word "cosmos" which
etymobgicaly means the universe or world, So cosmic power which is
related to the universe. It may be pointed out that if this power can
not be obtain by human being, then who will have it ? It is cle~rty
enunciated both in Indian & Western philosophy that there is the
supreme being who is having the cosmic power.
